docket_entries.description: INVALID SERVICE AS TO DEFEND, NO DESCRIPTION OF PARTY SERVED NEITHER ADDRESS WHERE SERVICE WAS MADE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ SAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARROYO JAVIER $1,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,140.00, $400.00 BY 1/15/93; $400.00 BY 2/15/93; $340.00 BY 3/15/93 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY PEREZ SAUL AS TO DEFENDANT ARROYO JAVIER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
